diagnosis: Motor temperature slightly elevated — early-stage cooling degradation detected.
recommended_action: Clean cooling fans and inspect heat exchanger. Monitor temperature for next 48 hours.

supporting_evidence.description: Belt temperature at 68°C, below warning threshold but trending up
No error codes at time of diagnosis

diagnosis: Bearing wear suspected — elevated temperature with increasing vibration trend.
recommended_action: Schedule bearing inspection within 48 hours. Monitor temperature closely. Reduce belt speed if temperature exceeds 82°C.

supporting_evidence.description: Temperature at 75.8°C, above warning threshold of 80°C
W_TEMP_HIGH error occurred 3 times in past 24 hours
Motor current elevated suggesting friction increase
